title: 7 Expected Dividend Increases In September
text: McDonald's, Starbucks, Lockheed Martin, Microsoft, Philip Morris, Texas Instruments, and Verizon are expected to announce dividend increases in September 2023. McDonald's and Starbucks have strong dividend growth histories and are expected to announce solid increases. Lockheed Martin, Microsoft, Philip Morris, Texas Instruments, and Verizon are expected to announce modest dividend increases.

title: Moat Masters: 3 Top Picks from the VanEck Morningstar SMID ETF
text: Have you ever looked into the VanEck Morningstar SMID Moat ETF (BATS:SMOT)? If you haven't, you should.

title: PSG Opens Expanded Facility to Support Growth
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- PSG, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a global pump, metering and dispensing-solution expert, recently announced the opening of its expanded facility in Grand Rapids, MI.

title: Dover Fueling Solutions Partners with GRUBBRR to Launch New Self-Ordering Solution for Convenience Stores and Fueling Stations
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, today announced a new partnership with GRUBBRR, a cutting-edge provider of self-ordering technology.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Dividend Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023
text: Generating passive income is easier said than done. A lot of investors look for dividend stocks to enjoy steady and consistent income.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Industrial Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023
text: The rally in tech stocks that lifted the broader market is falling victim to the dog days of August. Investors looking to make a pivot away from overvalued tech stocks may want to look at undervalued industrial stocks.

title: If I Could Only Buy 3 Stocks in 2023, I'd Pick These
text: Cintas provides uniforms, restroom supplies, and safety products and boasts a strong track record of producing consistent free cash flow. Dover is a diversified manufacturer of consumable supplies and aftermarket parts that has upped its dividend for 68 consecutive years.

title: Hydro Releases HydroMinder HP System
text: Builds on HydroMinder Technology to Create High-Pressure Chemical-Dilution System for Vehicle Washes DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Hydro, part of PSG and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the release of its new HydroMinder™ HP chemical-dilution system for use in tunnel vehicle wash systems.

title: 7 Dividend Kings That Have Raised Their Payouts for 50 Years (or More!)
text: Some of the most attractive opportunities are the top dividend kings, all of which have raised their payout for 50+ years. Even in times of economic disarray, inflation, booms, busts, rising interest rates, recessions, and crashes, they've still raised their dividends.

title: Wilden Releases New Pro-Flo SHIFT Series and Accu-Flo Series Bolted Plastic AODD Pump Models
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill. , Aug. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Wilden , part of PSG and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced that it has extended its line of small air-operated double-diaphragm (AODD) pumps with the addition of two new 6 mm (1/4") Bolted Plastic Pump models, the Pro-Flo® SHIFT Series PS25 and Accu-Flo™ Series A25PS.

title: Dover Increases Dividend
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Dover (NYSE: DOV) today increased its quarterly cash dividend to $0.51 (fifty one cents) per share, from the previous $0.505 (fifty and one-half cents) per share, an increase of $0.005 (one-half cent).

title: Dover Board Elects Danita K. Ostling as New Independent Director
